sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57549" key="ki/rswsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κίρσ-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n57549.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">becoming varicose</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl>(?)ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:45:18:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.18.29</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
